items.question: How do I write effective prompts for it?
items.answer: Write clear, specific descriptions with multiple details. Instead of just "scream," try "intense horror scream with echo in abandoned building," "desperate human scream with high emotion," or "wilhelm scream sound effect style." Include emotion, intensity, duration, environment, and any distinctive traits. Our generator responds well to technical and acoustic terms, including wilhelm scream sound effect. For complex scenarios, break them into parts and say how they combine. More context yields better results. Mention length or technical needs so the generator can optimize the output.
